title: PvP+: Reimagined
description: Just a simple modpack made to lift your PvP tier. Optimizations, Utilities, and advanced QoL mods you know and love. Includes shader and CIT support using Variants-CIT and Iris.
body:
# About this pack

A fast competitive Fabric client pack for modern PvP servers. It includes most modern optimizations along with subtle particle and sound mods that will help increase awareness and emphasize when someone is healing, poisoned, etc. This pack is allowed in servers, and is purely clientside. Now includes Dynamic Crosshair - changes when you are in range and gives better feedback about projectile spread. This mod also gives visual mining cues for when you are using the wrong tool. Also includes Nvidium; see more below.

**WARNING**

This pack contains seperate versions for Nvidium (alphadium git fork) and regular rendering. Nvidium is highly experimental (might crash), but can push framerates much higher than normal. Nvidium only works for Nvidia 16xx series GPUs or newer. This feature is auto disabled while using shaders.

# Why PvP+ Reimagined?
- ~9s startup time
- 200–400 FPS on modern hardware (with shaders)
- 100+ optimized client mods
- All your favorite resource packs
- Optimized for modern Fabric mods
- Includes Maces AS+ PvP resource pack
- Specially built for competitive PvP servers

# Shaders and Resource Packs
This pack utilizes existing mods, shaders, and resource packs. Some of these packs are not yet released, or have been renamed. Existing preloaded shaders are compatible with most PBR packs and other shaders that you might wish to use.

# Features
- totem pop counter for you or your opponent
- dynamic crosshair
- full iris shader support + built in Solas Shaders
- friends, social, and public worlds using Essential
- optimizations to help your game run faster and more efficiently
- creative tools to help recreate your pvp environment in singleplayer
- armor HUD to never lose track of your durability or gear
- clearer particles for easy heal tracking and repot notifiers
- footstep mod for clearer tracking of your opponents
- tnt timer
- utility resource packs for every scenario
- dynamic lighting and animations
- better weather and explosions
- elytra trails for easy tracking of opponents
- zoomify to help read your opponents from a distance
- shulker box tooltips, providing info on your inventory at a moment's notice
- colorful containers for a more lively feel
- easier beacon placement for hardcore or smp settings
- tnt computing optimizations for better performance
- chest tracking for quick sorting and storage
- visual chunk fading for smoother feel
- connected textures
- better startup screen
- elytra physics and flight physics, toggleable for pvp
- better tooltip and elytra info
- enchantment cues and ping nametags
- simple voice chat and rightclickharvest
- world map and options.txt file

# Additional Info
This modpack uses assets from other creators, with full legal permissions and rights. Do not copy, redistribute, or republish this modpack without explicit permission from the creator. All Rights Reserved (ARR).
